sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68470" key="moneimofore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μον-ειμοφορέω</orth>, <sense id="n68470.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wear one garment</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
